relevant_files: doc/项目路径选择器/01_需求规格说明书.md
api_contracts: CreateTask -> useTaskStore().createTask() -> POST /api/task (CreateTaskRequest: { requirement, category, mode, projectPath?: string })
Centralized HTTP client: packages/web/src/utils/http.ts expects ApiResponse<T> envelope: { success, data, error }
critical_logic: CreateTask projectPath field is a plain <input> bound to form.projectPath; submit passes projectPath: form.projectPath || undefined (keeps field optional).
All user-visible strings are via vue-i18n; CreateTask uses keys under create.* (e.g., create.projectPathLabel, create.projectPathPlaceholder).
UI styling uses custom global CSS utility classes (btn/card/form-*) and CSS variables in packages/web/src/assets/main.css.
Existing localStorage usage pattern exists in packages/web/src/i18n/index.ts (detectLocale/persistLocale); no existing recent-path storage yet.
HTTP calls must go through packages/web/src/utils/http.ts (store uses httpGet/httpPost/httpDelete).

phase_0.summary: 已输出‘项目路径选择器’需求规格说明书（含 Must/Should、UI 行为、范围边界、边界场景与可验收清单）。

phase_1.summary: 已定位 CreateTask 页面与‘项目路径（可选）’字段实现；梳理 i18n key、全局样式（form/btn/card）、HTTP/store/composable 约束与 localStorage 既有模式；并补充到 global_context。

phase_2.summary: 已实现项目路径选择器：新增最近路径 localStorage composable 与 PathPicker 组件（下拉最近路径、外部点击关闭、ESC 关闭、清除记录）；CreateTask 页面已替换输入控件并在创建成功后写入最近路径；中英文 i18n 已补充对应文案。

phase_3.summary: Build/Test/CodeReview/i18n全部通过。lint无实际script和缺少03文档为FAST模式预期行为，Orchestrator判定PASS。
